prompt: Implement `mergeIntervals(intervals: [number, number][]): [number, number][]` that merges all overlapping intervals and returns the result sorted by start time.
canonicalSolution: export function mergeIntervals(intervals: [number, number][]): [number, number][] { if (intervals.length === 0) return []; const sorted = intervals.slice().sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]); const result: [number, number][] = [sorted[0]!]; for (let i = 1; i < sorted.length; i++) { const last = result[result.length - 1]!; if (sorted[i]![0] <= last[1]) last[1] = Math.max(last[1], sorted[i]![1]); else result.push(sorted[i]!); } return result; }
